tasks.task_description: Add /agents/:slug/invoke endpoint to runtime for silent agent invocations (no chat history, returns structured data)
Update SADashboard to fetch calendar data on mount via silent agent invocation with structured prompt
Add context-aware prompt builder in SADashboard for interactive chat (e.g., analyze selected meeting)
Implement response parser in SADashboard to extract structured data from agent responses
Add loading states and error handling for both silent and interactive modes

description: Implement dashboard-as-agent-consumer pattern with silent data fetching and interactive chat
context: Added /agents/:slug/invoke endpoint that accepts prompt and silent flag, invokes agent with unique userId for silent requests, returns response text and tool calls

Updated SADashboard with: 1) Silent data fetching on mount that invokes agent to get calendar events via MCP tools, 2) Response parser to extract JSON from agent response, 3) Interactive "Analyze with AI" button that sends meeting context to chat and opens dock, 4) Loading states and error handling for both modes
